2605.07639.title: Tacit Knowledge Extraction via Logic Augmented Generation and Active Inference
2605.07639.paper_summary: Tacit knowledge plays a central role in human expertise, yet it remains difficult to capture, formalize, and reuse in machine-interpretable form. This challenge is especially relevant in procedural domains, where successful execution depends not only on explicit instructions, but also on implicit assumptions, contextual constraints, embodied skills, and experience-based judgments rarely documented. As a result, current knowledge engineering pipelines struggle to transform tacit and process-centric knowledge into formally specified, machine-interpretable representations that can be queried, validated, reasoned over, and reused. In this paper, we introduce a neuro-symbolic framework that combines Logic-Augmented Generation and an Active-Inference-inspired approach for ontology-grounded Knowledge Graph construction. We evaluate the approach in a knowledge transfer case study in manufacturing, using assembly-like repair procedures from instructional videos as a reproducible proxy domain. Results show that the proposed solution improves completeness and semantic quality, advancing neuro-symbolic knowledge engineering for industrial domains.
2605.07639.paper_summary_zh: 隱性知識在人的專業能力中扮演著核心角色，但它仍然難以以機器可解釋的形式捕捉、形式化和重用。這一挑戰在程序性領域尤其相關，因為成功執行不僅依賴於明確的指示，還依賴於隱含的假設、上下文限制、具身技能和基於經驗的判斷，這些通常未被記錄。因此，當前的知識工程流程在將隱性和以過程為中心的知識轉化為正式規範的、機器可解釋的表示形式方面面臨困難，這些表示形式可以被查詢、驗證、推理和重用。在本文中，我們介紹了一個神經符號框架，結合了邏輯增強生成和受主動推理啟發的方法，用於本體基礎的知識圖譜構建。我們在製造業的知識轉移案例研究中評估了這一方法，使用來自教學視頻的類似組裝的修理程序作為可重複的代理領域。結果顯示，所提出的解決方案提高了完整性和語義質量，推進了工業領域的神經符號知識工程。
2605.07639.author: Lorenzo Lamazzi et.al.
2605.07639.authors: Lorenzo Lamazzi, Aldo Gangemi, Alessio Giberti, Andrea Giovanni Nuzzolese, Vittorio Andrea Rocca, Mattia Torta, Francesco Poggi
